steps.title: Identify what they did with the phenomenon
steps.content: The passage says Saleem and colleagues demonstrated non-destructive assessment by showing that magnetic field alterations “can be measured from a distance and can reveal concentrations of stress.” The key signal is their action: they took an existing phenomenon and found a practical application for it.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
'Exploited' means 'put to practical use,' which describes exactly what they did — they took the magnetic field phenomenon and deployed it as a tool for their detection method.

Hypothesized (proposed a theory), discounted (dismissed), and redefined (changed the understanding) don't fit.

D is correct.
